title: The forkhead transcription factor FKH-7/FOXP acts in C. elegans chemosensory neurons to shape a life history strategy
abstract_snippet: Human FOXP1 can substitute for C. elegans FKH-7 in chemosensory neurons. Hypomorphic missense mutation associated with NDD reduces adaptive response. Single-cell transcriptomics of variant-expressing neurons.
summary: Human FOXP1 functionally substitutes for C. elegans FKH-7 in chemosensory neurons. An NDD-associated missense variant reduces adaptive developmental response in worm populations. Single-cell transcriptomics identifies variant-specific molecular targets at neuron-level resolution. Directly relevant to FOXP1 biology and variant effect mechanisms.
